Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- two-story brick commercial building at left block face, 2 stories
- single-story retail building at center block face, 1 story
- corner mixed-use building at right corner, 3 stories
- immutable elements: cast iron storefront columns on left building, recessed corner entrance on right building, brick alley mid-block
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 1985
Reagan era prosperity. A 1985 main street in transition — neon and backlit plastic overtaking hand-painted signs, a first small video rental shop among the old local stores.

PERIOD DETAILS
- the same local diner, now with a backlit sign and 'HOT COFFEE 45¢' in the window
- video arcade with a 'GAMES 25¢' neon sign and posters in the window
- hair salon with a neon script 'STYLES' sign
Typography: bold geometric sans-serif, early computer-influenced fonts.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 10 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a man in a windbreaker reading a newspaper by the corner
- a woman using the wall-mounted payphone
Clothing: men in windbreakers, acid wash jeans; women in high-waisted jeans, shoulder pads. Fashion palette: neon pink, electric blue, purple. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 5 period vehicles, all different:
- 1984-1988 Toyota Pickup — small, boxy, popular import — light blue
- 1986-1991 Ford Taurus — aerodynamic, rounded, revolutionary look — burgundy
- 1981-1988 Oldsmobile Cutlass Ciera — boxy, formal roofline — white
- 1984-1990 Dodge Caravan — first minivan, boxy — red
- 1980-1985 Cadillac Seville — sharp formal lines, bustleback — charcoal gray
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 1985.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, painted crosswalks
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, wooden utility poles

TREES
- oak tree at sidewalk left near corner: young tree, thin trunk
- maple tree at sidewalk center in front of retail: very young sapling

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — Kodacolor VR 200 or Fujicolor 100 look.
Color: slightly cool tones compared to 1970s. Grain: moderate grain, cleaner than 1975.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 1984-1988 Toyota Pickup — small, boxy, popular import
1986-1991 Ford Taurus — aerodynamic, rounded, revolutionary look
1981-1988 Oldsmobile Cutlass Ciera — boxy, formal roofline
1980-1985 Cadillac Seville — sharp formal lines, bustleback
